source: live CDP DOM walk of https://m.bunjang.co.kr/ — mobile (390×844 dpr=3, iOS UA)

regions.name: App-Download Banner (top)
anatomy: Logo icon (32×32, rounded-rect bitmap with gradient inside — see logo-icon.svg)
Body copy ~14-16px, fontWeight 400, color #191919
Primary CTA chip ('앱 다운로드') — bg #d80c18, color #ffffff, radius 4px, padding 8/12, fontSize 16px (XS variant)
Close × button, 16×16, fill #8c8c8c (gray-400)

regions.name: Header (search + login)
anatomy: Hamburger icon-button — 20×20 SVG, fill #191919
Wordmark logo (clickable, returns to /)

Search input — placeholder '검색', fontFamily 'Pretendard Variable, sans-serif', fontSize 15px, fontWeight 500, lineHeight 18px, color #191919, transparent bg, no visible border (rounded grey pill container behind it)
Right cluster: 알림(bell) icon, 장바구니/찜 access, '로그인/회원가입' button — secondary style: bg #ffffff, color #4c4c4c (gray-700), border 1px solid #e5e5e5 (gray-100), radius 6px, padding 12/20, fontSize 16px
regions._note: Login button appears desktop-only on this width; mobile compresses to icon-only cluster

regions.name: Category Nav (horizontal scroll)
regions.selector: nav (top-level under header on desktop) / chip rail on mobile
anatomy: Inline link list separated by ~16px gap
Items observed: 카테고리, 스포츠/레저, 스타굿즈, 디지털, 키덜트, 여성의류, 메루카리, 판매자센터
fontSize 16px, fontWeight 400 (active link a.active has no color shift — emphasis is purely positional/underline)
color #191919 across all items

regions.name: Hero / Promotion Carousel
anatomy: Full-bleed image carousel with '1 / 10' counter chip overlay (semi-transparent bg rgba(0,0,0,0.3), radius 999px, white text)
Vertical aspect ratio per --bun-ui-aspect-ratio-vertical (81/100) is reserved for product cards; hero is typically 16:9 or landscape-banner

regions.name: Quick-Action Row
anatomy: Horizontally scrolling quick-tap rail: 찜 (wishlist) · 최근본상품 (recently viewed) · 내폰시세 (my-phone price-check) · 스포츠 · 디지털 · 스타굿즈 · …
Each item: icon (circular tinted bg) above 12-14px label
'내폰시세' is a Bunjang-specific service entry — fast access to phone resale price

regions.name: Section Header ('오늘의 추천 아이템')
anatomy: Title fontSize ~18-20px fontWeight 700 color #191919
Optional '더보기' link on the right, fontSize 12-14px fontWeight 500 color gray-500 #7f7f7f

regions.name: Product Card Grid (2-col on mobile)
anatomy: ThumbnailContainer — aspect-ratio 81/100 (vertical), borderRadius 6px (set via inline --radiusVar__1j9duj80), background #f6f6f6 placeholder
Image — loading='lazy', src from media.bunjang.co.kr, object-fit cover
Heart (찜) button — absolute top-right, 40×40 padding, 20×20 SVG icon, fill 'none' + stroke #fff with 10% black backdrop drop — outlined when unliked, filled red when liked
Below thumbnail (vertical stack with 0 explicit padding, parent flex gap):
Price — fontSize 16px fontWeight 700 color #191919 (e.g. '600,000원')
Title — fontSize 14px fontWeight 500 color #666 (gray-600), max-lines 1-2
Meta row — fontSize 12px fontWeight 500 color #999 (gray-300) — '19시간 전' · region · 찜 count
_taxonomy-of-card-types: 안전결제 (escrow eligible): adds a small '안전결제' chip — uses --color-safe-* tier
감정 (authenticated for luxury): adds --color-care-* warm-amber chip — most prominent on 명품 / 시계 / 가방 categories

regions.name: Bottom Tab Bar (mobile native app only; web shows app-CTA strip)
regions._note: Web m.bunjang.co.kr uses sticky bottom 'install our app' strip in place of an in-app tab bar. Tabs observed in app: 홈 / 카테고리 / 등록 / 채팅 / 마이
anatomy: 5 equally-spaced icon+label items
Center '등록' (sell) likely a raised circular FAB in red #d80c18
Label fontSize 12px

regions.name: Footer
anatomy: Background #f6f6f6 (gray-50)
Padding 20px 132px 40px on desktop wide; tighter on mobile
Link list: 회사소개 · 이용약관 · 운영정책 · 개인정보처리방침 · 청소년보호정책 · 광고제휴
Business-info dump — 사업자등록번호, 대표이사, 주소, 통신판매업신고
fontSize 12-13px fontWeight 400 color #666 (gray-600)

layout-rules.page-max-width: 1240px (--layout-width-large) — content centered; mobile flex column from 390px baseline
layout-rules.section-padding-vertical: 24-32px between sections (observed gap from rect offsets)
layout-rules.thumbnail-aspect: always 81:100 portrait (Bunjang treats vertical product photos as canonical — phones, sneakers, K-pop goods photograph taller than they are wide)

primary-cta.shape: rectangle with 4-6px radius (NOT pill, NOT square)
primary-cta._note: Red is RESERVED for the highest-intent action on a surface — almost always 'open the app' on web, or '구매하기' / '등록하기' inside app. Never used on browse or category surfaces.

chip.shape: pill 999px or rounded 4-6px depending on size
chip._observed: category chips, status chips on cards

heart.states: outlined (default) → filled red on tap; 10% black inner glow gives the icon legibility against thumbnail backgrounds
